description: Phase 1B: Fix TypeScript errors in packages/database. After Prisma generate, only test file errors remain (unused parameters in test callbacks and a ConstructorParameters type issue). Fix these without weakening strictness.
steps: In packages/database/src/__tests__/repositories.test.ts: prefix unused parameters with underscore (e.g., 'opts' -> '_opts', 'tx' -> '_tx') to satisfy noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters.

In packages/database/src/__tests__/repositories.test.ts line 83: fix the 'typeof PrismaClient does not satisfy (...args: any) => any' error. This is likely a ConstructorParameters<typeof PrismaClient> usage that needs to use InstanceType or a different approach. Inspect the code and fix the type constraint.
Verify: run 'pnpm --filter @quant/database run typecheck' and confirm zero errors.
acceptance_criteria: 'pnpm --filter @quant/database run typecheck' passes with zero errors
verification: Run 'pnpm --filter @quant/database run typecheck' and confirm exit code 0
